name: Agent OS Content Tools
description: Register summarize_url, generate_image, generate_video tools that call the Agent OS backend. No hardcoded URLs; baseUrl and apiKey from config or env.

baseUrl.description: Agent OS backend base URL (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:3001). Overrides AGENT_OS_API_URL env.

apiKey.description: Optional. Bearer token for backend auth (overrides TOOLS_API_KEY env).
